targets.sourceTitle: Príkaz rektora č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na UNIZA
PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline

stopConditions: Stop after official UNIZA rector-order text is fetched and source-linked claim candidates are staged.
Reject source candidates that are department-specific, event/training pages, research-only pages, or not AI policy evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Príkaz rektora č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na UNIZA
artifacts.queryUsed: site:uniza.sk "generatívna umelá inteligencia" OR "generatívnej umelej inteligencie"
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UNIZA announcement states that Rector's Order No. 1/2026 sets basic GenAI rules for students, research activity, and safe use, and links to the PDF text.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.queryUsed: Attachment linked from official UNIZA Rector's Order announcement
artifacts.verificationNotes: PDF fetched from www.uniza.sk with HTTP 200, application/pdf, Last-Modified Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:41:05 GMT; Firecrawl PDF extraction returned the full two-page rector order.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Usmernenie k využívaniu AI v záverečných prácach
artifacts.verificationNotes: The source is official-domain guidance for final theses discovered via a department path, but it is not used for university-wide claims because the later rector order is the official university-wide source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Kurz umelá inteligencia - Ústav celoživotného vzdelávania, UNIZA
artifacts.verificationNotes: Training/course page about AI tools; not policy evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: University of Zilina artificial intelligence policy generative AI academic integrity site:uniza.sk OR site:uniza.eu
methodsAttempted.notes: Initial English query returned mostly research, conference, and thesis-topic material.
Found official-domain AI thesis guidance and the rector-order PDF.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uniza.sk "generatívna umelá inteligencia" OR "generatívnej umelej inteligencie"
methodsAttempted.notes: Found the official UNIZA page for Rector's Order No. 1/2026 and duplicate/department mirrors.
Fetched the official English homepage and identified adjacent official policy links such as the Ethical Codex; robots.txt returned 404 with no crawler disallow rules found.
Followed the official announcement attachment to the canonical UNIZA-hosted rector-order PDF.

artifacts.summary: Official Slovak-language UNIZA searches found Rector's Order No. 1/2026 as the university-wide GenAI source. Department guidance and training/event pages were rejected for not being the best university-wide policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Použitie týchto a podobných generatívnych nástrojov v záverečných prácach musí byť transparentné a podliehať pravidlám akademickej etiky, vrátane citovania generovaného obsahu.
artifacts.notes: Relevant official-domain thesis guidance, but not used for university-wide claims because Rector's Order No. 1/2026 is broader and current.
AI course/training page, not an official policy or governance rule source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Príkaz rektora č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na UNIZA
PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline

artifacts.claimText: University of Zilina has a university-wide Rector's Order No. 1/2026 that introduces rules for ethical, safe, and transparent use of generative AI by employees and students in education, research, and administrative activities.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Rector's Order No. 1/2026 applies to GenAI use by UNIZA employees and students in education, research, and administration.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For seminar, semester, and final theses, University of Zilina students must clearly state whether and to what extent they used GenAI tools, including the tool name/version, a brief use description, and prompts in an appendix.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Student GenAI use in seminar, semester, and final works must be disclosed with tool/version, use description, and prompts.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: University of Zilina prohibits students from submitting work generated by GenAI in substantial or full scope without their own creative contribution, and requires students to respect instructor restrictions on GenAI use in a course.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Substantial/full GenAI-generated student work without the student's own creative contribution is prohibited; instructor course limits must be respected.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For research outputs, University of Zilina says GenAI tools may not be listed as an author or co-author unless the publisher requires it, and GenAI use for data generation, visualizations, translation, or statistical processing must be explicitly stated in the methodology or acknowledgements.
artifacts.normalizedValue: GenAI is not to be listed as research author/co-author unless publisher-required; specified research uses must be disclosed in methodology or acknowledgements.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: University of Zilina prohibits employees and students from entering sensitive data into publicly available GenAI tools, including non-public university data, non-public study materials, test assignments, intellectual-property-protected materials, personal data without explicit written consent, preliminary research results, and trade-secret data of partners.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Sensitive data must not be entered into publicly available GenAI tools.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: If University of Zilina provides paid licenses for GenAI tools, employees and students are directed to prefer them over unverified free tools.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Paid UNIZA-provided GenAI licenses should be preferred over unverified free tools when available.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: University of Zilina treats undisclosed GenAI use, false information about the extent of GenAI use, and generated references to non-existent literature as disciplinary offenses or ethical-rule violations under its student disciplinary order and ethical code.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Undisclosed GenAI use, false disclosure, and generated non-existent references are disciplinary or ethical violations.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Účelom vydania tohto príkazu rektora je oboznámenie všetkých zamestnancov a študentov Žilinskej univerzity v Žiline (ďalej len „UNIZA“) s pravidlami súvisiacimi s etickým, bezpečným a transparentným používaním nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie (ďalej len „GenAI“) vo vzdelávaní, vedecko-výskumnej činnosti a administratívnych činnostiach v prostredí UNIZA.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The rector order says its purpose is to inform all UNIZA employees and students about rules for ethical, safe, and transparent GenAI use in education, research, and administrative activities.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Pri vypracovaní seminárnych, semestrálnych a záverečných prác je študent povinný jasne uviesť, či a v akom rozsahu využil nástroje GenAI. V prípade použitia nástrojov GenAI je potrebné uviesť názov nástroja a použitú verziu ... stručný popis, na čo bol nástroj použitý ... a v prílohe uviesť použité dopyty (prompty).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For seminar, semester, and final works, students must clearly state whether and how much they used GenAI, identify the tool/version and use, and include prompts in an appendix.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Je neprípustné, aby študent vypracoval a odovzdal prácu, ktorá bola v podstatnom rozsahu (v rozsahu ucelených kapitol) alebo celom rozsahu vygenerovaná nástrojmi GenAI bez vlastného tvorivého vkladu študenta. ... V prípade, ak vyučujúci v rámci predmetu nepovolí použitie nástrojov GenAI alebo ich použitie obmedzí, študent je povinný tieto pokyny rešpektovať.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The order says a student may not submit substantial/full GenAI-generated work without their own creative contribution, and must respect course instructor restrictions.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Pri výstupoch vedecko-výskumnej činnosti nie je povolené uvádzať, ak to samotné vydavateľstvo nepožaduje, nástroje GenAI ako autora alebo spoluautora vedeckého výstupu ... V prípade, ak boli nástroje GenAI použité pri generovaní údajov, vizualizáciách, preklade alebo pri štatistickom spracovaní výsledkov, musí to byť explicitne uvedené v časti, kde je popisovaná metodika alebo v časti „Poďakovanie“.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For research outputs, GenAI tools are not listed as authors unless the publisher requires it, and specified GenAI uses must be disclosed in methodology or acknowledgements.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Zamestnanci a študenti UNIZA majú zákaz vkladať do verejne dostupných nástrojov GenAI citlivé údaje, medzi ktoré patria napr. neverejné údaje univerzity, neverejné študijné materiály, zadania testov, materiály podliehajúce ochrane duševného vlastníctva, osobné údaje akýchkoľvek osôb bez ich výslovného písomného súhlasu, predbežné výsledky výskumu ... alebo údaje podliehajúce obchodnému tajomstvu zmluvných partnerov.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Employees and students are prohibited from entering sensitive data into publicly available GenAI tools, including non-public university/study materials, test assignments, protected IP, personal data without written consent, preliminary research, or trade secrets.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: V prípade, ak UNIZA poskytuje platené licencie pre nástroje GenAI, je potrebné ich uprednostniť pred neoverenými bezplatnými nástrojmi.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: If UNIZA provides paid licenses for GenAI tools, they should be preferred over unverified free tools.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PRÍKAZ REKTORA č. 1/2026 o používaní nástrojov generatívnej umelej inteligencie na Žilinskej univerzite v Žiline
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Za disciplinárny priestupok podľa Smernice č. 201 ... a porušenie etických pravidiel podľa Smernice č. 207 ... sa považuje najmä: a. nepriznané použitie nástrojov GenAI (tzv. plagiátorstvo / AI plagiátorstvo), b. nepravdivé informácie o rozsahu použitia nástrojov GenAI, c. predloženie vygenerovaných referencií na neexistujúcu literatúru.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The order lists undisclosed GenAI use, false information about extent of GenAI use, and generated references to non-existent literature as disciplinary or ethical violations.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Narrow source-status claim about existence and scope of Rector's Order No. 1/2026; not marked canonical.
Claim tracks Article 3 paragraph 1 disclosure language and does not add unstated citation rules.
Claim uses mandatory/prohibitory language because Article 3 uses povinný and neprípustné.
Claim is limited to research outputs and disclosure/authorship rules in Article 4.
Claim is directly supported by the Article 5 ban on entering sensitive data into publicly available GenAI tools.
Claim preserves the source condition: only if UNIZA provides paid licenses.
Claim is limited to violations listed in Article 6 and references the disciplinary/ethical rules named there.

artifacts.title: University of Zilina GenAI Rector Order
artifacts.summary: University of Zilina's official Rector's Order No. 1/2026 sets university-wide GenAI rules for students and employees, including student disclosure, limits on generated work, research disclosure and authorship rules, sensitive-data restrictions, license preference, and disciplinary treatment of undisclosed or false GenAI use.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are agent-reviewed staging candidates only and are not canonical public claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
